nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海雀科
nodes.summary: 海雀科（Alcidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如角嘴海雀、花魁鳥、北极海鹦等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pigeon guillemot
nodes.summary: Pigeon guillemot（Pigeon guillemot，学名 Cepphus columba），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入海雀科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括气候变化、外来捕食者。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats to this bird include climate change, introduced mammalian predators, and oil spills

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This is due to multiple factors, including its large population, estimated at 470,000 individuals, its stable population, and its large range, as this bird is thought to occur over a range of . This bird is vulnerable to introduced mammalian predators, such as raccoons. The removal of introduced predators from breeding islands allows the species to recover.{{cite journal|last1=Byrd|first1=G
